steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The smaller map is 70% shorter, so it keeps 30% of the original side length. Both maps cover the same territory, so a shorter map means more miles per inch. The new scale = original scale ÷ 0.30.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — '3.9 miles per inch': This is 13 × 0.30, applying the shrink factor instead of inverting it. ✗
  • Choice B — '16.5 miles per inch': This is the new side length in inches, not the scale. ✗
  • Choice C — '27 miles per inch': Off by a factor; doesn't match 13 ÷ 0.30. ✗
  • Choice D — '130/3 miles per inch': 13 ÷ 0.30 = 13 × (10/3) = 130/3 ≈ 43.3. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
